name: Make your own Triumphal Arch
description: Create your own triumphal arch on the site of Trump's proposed arch.

name: Tree Pose in the National Arboretum
points: Practice Vrksasana in the pagoda gazebo at the National Arboretum.
description: Free

name: Roll a 20 at Labyrinth
description: Score a critical hit on a d20 at Free RPG day at Labyrinth Games & Puzzles.

name: Compare Fabergé and Chicken Eggs
description: Compare the size of a real chicken egg and a Fabergé egg in the Hillwood collection.

name: Fall down the Exorcist Steps
description: Recreate being thrown from a window down these treacherous stairs.

name: Have a Beer at the Brewmaster's Castle
description: Enjoy a cold one at the Heurich House Biergarten.

name: Cher the love at Sonny Bono Park
description: Sing a copyrighted Cher song while dressed as Cher.

name: Donate a Barbie to the Q St Pond
description: Donate a Barbie Doll to the Q Street Pond.

name: Fly like Kate Winslet at the Titanic Memorial
description: Recreate the bow of the ship scene from Titanic at the Titanic Memorial.

name: Lotus Pose with the Lotuses
description: Practice Padmasana in front of Lotuses at the Kenilworth Aquatic Gardens

name: Mimic Kilroy at the WWII Memorial
description: Mimic Kilroy's pose at the WWII Memorial, both you and he must be in frame.

name: Blue Yourself at the Reflecting Pool
description: Paint your face blue (a la Tobias Fünke) to match the new color of the Reflecting Pool.

name: Set Your Watch by the Master Clock
description: Set the time on your watch or other clock using the USNO Master Clock.

name: Drop Newton's Apple on your Head
description: Drop an apple on your head under the NIST clone of the Newton Apple Tree.

name: Bread First
description: Eat bread from Bread Furst; must be the first photo you take.

name: Bury a Bone at Capitalsaurus Court
description: Bury a bone (any kind) in the dirt where the Capitalsaurus was found.

name: Give Serenity a new nose
description: Create a new nose for the Serenity Statue in Malcolm X park and add it to her face.

name: Cut Paper on The Knife's Edge
description: Cut a piece of paper using the sharp edge of the East Building.

name: Eat a Lime at the Lime Kilns
description: Eat a lime in front of the Godey's Lime Kilns.

name: Take a shot at the Temperance Fountain
description: Take a shot (1 oz of any alcohol) at the Temperance Fountain.

name: Do a Cartwheel at Cartwheel Tower
description: Do a Cartwheel in front of this Cold War antenna tower.

name: Play Techno at the D.C. War Memorial
description: Play a digital instrument in the bandstand on the Mall.

name: Walk the Labyrinth Blind
description: Walk through the Georgetown Waterfront Labyrinth with your eyes closed.

name: Get Change at the Mint
description: Pay with cash and receive change at the U.S. Mint Coin Store.

name: Lay Flowers for the Rats
description: Lay flowers at one of the Rat Graves on the Gallaudet Mall.

name: Eat Watermelon at the Watermelon House
description: Eat watermelon in front of the watermelon house.

name: Light a Candle in the Japanese Lantern
description: Light a candle and place it in the Japanese Stone Lantern.

name: Eat Ice Cream on the Spanish Steps
description: Channel a Roman Holiday and eat ice cream on the Spanish Steps.

name: Call a Member of the Opposing Team at the Marconi Memorial
description: Phone a member of the other team at this memorial to the radio's creator.

name: Recreate a Teen Portrait
description: Recreate one of the finalists in the 2025 Teen Portrait Competition at the National Portrait Gallery.

name: Ride the Longest Escalator in the Western Hemisphere
description: Ride the Wheaton Escalator.

name: Bypass Rock Creek
description: Bring water from Crabbs Branch to the Potomac without it going through Rock Creek, take a photo at both location.

name: Rename Carey Park
description: Make a new sign for 'Lillian' Carey Park to rename it James Carey Park.

name: Climb the Bouldering Project
description: Climb the outside of the Bouldering Project.

name: One Mile Run
description: Run one mile on the Four Mile Run trail.

name: Be in Maryland in Virginia
description: Be in the Maryland section of Jones' Point (as def. by the Boundary Stone or Google).

name: Read a First and Second Story
description: Find the same book in both the Dupont Circle and Rockville locations of Second Story books.

name: Send a boat down the Cascading Waterfall
description: Send a boat down at least 3 levels of the Malcolm X Park Waterfall.

name: Get your Library (of Congress) Card
description: Get a library card at the Library of Congress.

name: Point at Hains Point
description: From any location on the south side of the Anacostia River, point to Hains Point.

name: Fletch at Fletchers Cove
description: Make an arrow at Fletcher's Cove.

name: Get your Head Down Under
description: Do a head-stand lasting at least 60 seconds at the Embassy of Australia.

name: Eat Butter at the Butter Cow
description: Eat from a stick of butter in front of the Butter Cow at the Renwick.

name: Become a Statue Dupe
description: Duplicate one of the statues at National Harbor.

name: Catch the Oronoco Flow
description: Record singing Orinoco Flow at Oronoco Bay.

name: Play a Disc Golf Basket
description: Play one whole disc golf hole at the Calvert Road Disc Golf course.

name: Assemble at Comic Hero Playground
description: Recreate a comic book panel at Comic Hero Playground; must submit the panel.

name: Eat Berries at Marrion Park
description: Eat berries at Marrion Park.

name: Exchange a Tiny Toy
description: Exchange a tiny toy at the SW DC Tiny Toy Exchange.

name: Be Late to Sundressfest
description: Wear a Sundress to Wonderland Ballroom

name: Eat a Costco Hotdog in VA
description: Eat a hotdog at the Arlington Costco Food Court.

name: Eat a Costco Hotdog in DC
description: Eat a hotdog at the DC Costco Food Court.

name: Eat a Costco Hotdog in MD
description: Eat a hotdog at the Wheaton Costco Food Court.

name: Find Head, Shoulders, Knees, and Toes
description: Find head, shoulders, knees, and toes at the National Museum of Health and Medicine.

name: Do a Jumpin' Jack at Jumpin' Jack Spring
description: Do a jumping jack at Jumpin' Jack Spring.

name: Can I Pet Your Dog? I
description: Pet a dog at the S Street Dog Park; you must learn the dog's name.

name: Abandon Capitalism
description: Leave one dollar at the Victims of Communism Memorial.

name: Can I Pet Your Dog? II
description: Pet a dog at the Eckington Dog Park; you must learn the dog's name.

name: Can I Pet Your Dog? III
description: Pet a dog at the Walter Pierce Dog Park; you must learn the dog's name.

name: Can I Pet Your Dog? IV
description: Pet a dog at the Francis Dog Park; you must learn the dog's name.

name: Can I Pet Your Dog? V
points: Pet a dog at the Shirlington Dog Park; you must learn the dog's name.
description: Free

name: Buy James a Beer I
description: Buy the party a 6 pack at Aslin 14th Street.

name: Buy James a Beer II
description: Buy the party a 6 pack at Bluejacket.

name: Buy James a Beer III
description: Buy the party a 6 pack at Lost Generation.

name: Buy James a Beer IV
description: Buy the party a 6 pack at Other Half.

name: Buy James a Beer V
description: Buy the party a 6 pack at Caboose Brewing.

name: Sit Atop Genius
description: Sit on top of the Albert Einstein Memorial.

name: Give Jack Fish a Fish
description: Give a fish (any kind) to the fountains of NPS Regional Director Jack Fish.

name: Ad(d)ams' Family Values
description: Record a score on the Addams Family pinball at VÜK Pinball; +5 points if your last name is Adams.

name: Play a Tune at the Glass Forest
description: Play a tune (doesn't need to be good) on the Glass Forest.

name: There's a McDonalds in the Pentagon (City)
description: Order an eat one item from the Pentagon City McDonalds.

name: Be in DC in Virginia
description: Pose in front of the house downspout labeled "Alexandria, DC."

name: Fill Up the Ice Well
description: Drop (frozen) ice at the Historic Ice Well monument.

name: Find a Lady Bird at the Johnson Memorial Grove
description: Take a picture with a bird at the LBJ Memorial Grove.

name: Flop at Audi Field
description: Preform a Soccer Flop at Audi Field.

name: Buy James Booze
description: Buy the party a bottle of Rum at Cotton and Reed.

name: Buy James Booze (European Style)
description: Buy the party a bottle of liqueur at Don Ciccio & Figli.

name: Echo at Echostage
description: Shout down the ally outside of Echostage.

name: Okay, PB
description: Eat a Peanut Butter sandwich in front of OKPB.

name: Make a Friend at Mt Pleasant Library
description: Turn a stranger into a friend at Mt Pleasant Neighborhood Library.

name: Show Dante the Inferno
description: Light a (small, controlled) flame in front of the Dante Alighieri statute.

name: Chain Yourself to Chain Bridge
description: Chain yourself (temporarily) to Chain Bridge.

name: Bunt for the Nats
description: Bunt an (improvised?) ball using an (improvised?) bat in front of Nats Stadium.

name: Get scared by the Gaurdian Spider and Shadow Snake
description: Show yourself scared by Basil Kincaid's Guardian Spider and Shadow Snake at the Rubell Museum.

name: Planespot at Gravelly Point
description: Get a picture with a plane taking off at Gravelly Point.

name: Pull a Charlie Brown at RFK
description: Recreate the classic Charlie Brown/Lucy comic in front of RFK stadium.

name: Crack a Pack at Fantom Comics
description: Open a pack of Magic, the Gathering cards at Fantom comics; point value is equal to the current cost of the most expensive card on TCGPlayer.

name: Buy James Wine
description: Buy the party a bottle of wine from Sonny's Pizza.

name: Mail James a Birthday Card
description: Mail James a birthday card from the National Postal Museum.

name: Merry-Go-Round-And-Round
description: Ride the Carousel on the National Mall, twice.

name: Flexin' like Flavin
description: Use your body to recreate a piece by Dan Flavin in the Hirshhorn.

name: Eat the Ice-Cream of the Future
description: Eat Dippin' Dots in the National Zoo.
